name: Sharon Jones
description: American soul funk singer from NYC
abstract: Sharon Lafaye Jones (May 4, 1956 – November 18, 2016) was an American soul and funk singer. She was the lead singer of Sharon Jones & The Dap-Kings, a soul and funk band based in Brooklyn, New York.

concerts.label: The Music of David Byrne and Talking Heads
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

concerts.label: Tibet House U.S. Benefit Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: And then I played with Sharon Jones, the great singer that’s in her seventies.
